seo.title: Best Daily Brunch in Little Italy San Diego | Coco Maya
seo.descriptionTemplate: Best brunch in Little Italy San Diego at Coco Maya, served daily until 3PM. Craft cocktails on the rooftop patio, seven days a week. {{fullAddress}}.

intro.title: Best Brunch in Little Italy San Diego
intro.body1: Daily brunch at Coco Maya is not just a meal. It is a setting. The glass atrium opens to the San Diego sky, the elevated patio fills with tropical greenery, and the kitchen sends out plates that actually earn the word elevated.
intro.body2Template: Whether you are celebrating something or just making your morning count, the patio at {{street}} is the right call. Brunch is served every day of the week, until 3 PM.
intro.imageAlt: Rooftop patio brunch at Coco Maya — best brunch Little Italy San Diego

highlightsHeading.title: Everything you need for a great morning

highlights.label: Brunch Cocktails
highlights.body: Bloody marys and select craft cocktails available every day of the week.

highlights.label: Modern Coastal Plates
highlights.body: Fresh seafood, seasonal produce, and elevated brunch classics from the Coco Maya kitchen.

highlights.label: The Elevated Patio
highlights.body: Brunch on one of San Diego most distinctive patios. Pink striped umbrellas, tropical greenery, and the Little Italy skyline.

atmosphere.imageAlt: Coco Maya rooftop patio — brunch and cocktails in Little Italy San Diego
atmosphere.line:
Stay for cocktails.
Open every day.

drinks.title: Brunch drinks worth the trip
drinks.subtitle: Craft cocktails and brunch classics available every day of the week.

private.label: Private Brunch Events
private.title: Brunch buyouts for groups
private.body: Birthdays, bachelorettes, baby showers. Book a private brunch for your group on the patio or in the dining room.

reservation.label: Make a Reservation
reservation.title: Reserve your table now
reservation.body: Served daily until 3 PM. Book online or call us directly. Walk-ins welcome based on availability.
